raw_response: Given your preference for Anker and moderate quality sensitivity, the Anker Prime 100W charger is an excellent choice. It offers high-speed charging with GaN technology, supporting both laptops and smartphones simultaneously. Though it's slightly pricier than other options, its robust build and compact form factor make it ideal for a desk setup. The premium features justify the cost, especially considering your brand familiarity and quality considerations.
